nodes.content:
# Ospain2

This map summarizes repository structure and important exploration paths. Start with subsystem nodes and follow evidence-backed links to inspect source files.

## Domain Clusters
- Explore [[cursor-rules]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[t2p-src]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[t2p-dist]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[out-components]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[out-rules]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[src-components]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[out-services]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[mcp-servers-shared]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[agents-system-src]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[src-services]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[cursor-memory]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[agents-system-docs]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[docs-h3]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[src-rules]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[cursor-mcp-servers]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[docs-frontend]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.

## Explorations Needed
- Which subsystems should be prioritized for onboarding documentation?
- Which dependencies are high-risk and need version guardrails?
- Where should integration tests be expanded based on current topology?
